case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. WILLIAMS, CALVIN J.

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CALVIN J. $2,722.75 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,802.75
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,646.07 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CALVIN J. $5,485.12 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,485.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED JUN-07-2005, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CALVIN J. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUL-13-2005 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
